2026-03-13GACOther Than Statutory AuthorityOrder Ratifying the Agreement on the Establishment of the International Vaccine Institute, done at New York on October 28, 1996, as amended as of November 16, 2022 Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary for Canada to accede to the Agreement on the Establishment of the International Vaccine Institute, done at New York on October 28, 1996, as amended as of November 16, 2022.N/A
subject: Order Ratifying the Agreement on the Establishment of the International Vaccine Institute, done at New York on October 28, 1996, as amended as of November 16, 2022
precis: Order authorizing the Minister of Foreign Affairs to take the actions necessary for Canada to accede to the Agreement on the Establishment of the International Vaccine Institute, done at New York on October 28, 1996, as amended as of November 16, 2022.
